steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content:
Text 1 establishes that different national definitions prevent comparison of urbanization.

Text 2's key signal is its description of what international organizations recently developed—a new measure with global criteria.

This language signals the availability of a solution to the inconsistency problem.

steps.title: Match the signal to the correct answer
steps.content:
This signal—indicating a solution has become available—is exactly what choice C describes: noting that a possible solution to the problem is available.

Choices A, B, and D describe different response methods (recommending further investigation, abandoning the research topic, or adding more problems), but Text 2 is presenting a developed solution.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
